narrative:
Danbury 4 (precinct in Ottawa County) has 735 registered voters, with 46.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.7 percentage points.
